overview: Nebraska Functional Medicine uses a patient-centered, functional medicine approach to identify root causes of illness and promote optimal health through personalized treatment plans and various wellness modalities.
highlights: IV nutrient therapy with custom infusions
Functional lab testing with personalized treatment plans
Infrared sauna, holistic spa services, and KAQUN water therapy
targetAudience: Individuals seeking root-cause analysis and functional medicine approaches to optimize health and address chronic illness.
